## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify it? -->

- [ ] `PlenaryBustedDirectory tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `stylua --check lua tests plugin` is clean
- [ ] `luacheck lua tests plugin` is clean

## Checklist

- [ ] `README.md` updated if behaviour or config changed (docs are generated
      from it — do not hand-edit `doc/beads.txt`)
- [ ] No personal data, secrets, or real `.beads/` content in the diff
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
